title: T-007 — mv_inventory_aging + mv_wo_status_summary + mv_shipment_otd_weekly MVs DDL (12-REPORTING §9.1)
prompt:
# T-007 — Operational MVs (Inventory Aging + WO Status + Shipment OTD)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §9.1 (MV definitions), §4.1 (Inventory Aging #6, WO Status #7, Shipment OTD #8 P1 musts)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 3 operational dashboards' source MVs. Each is org-scoped + site_id REC-L1 + unique-indexed + service-helper-gated. Consumers of 05-WAREHOUSE (license_plates), 08-PRODUCTION (work_orders + wo_executions), 11-SHIPPING (shipments + sales_orders) source tables. 11-SHIPPING module has zero atomic tasks today — guard with `IF EXISTS` check or stub-table pattern so this migration is decoupled and can be applied before shipping decomposition lands.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0084_reporting_mv_operational.sql`:
   - `mv_inventory_aging (org_id, site_id, warehouse_id, product_id, age_bucket, lp_count, total_kg, oldest_expiry)` — from 05-WH license_plates with computed `age_bucket = CASE WHEN now()-received_at < '7 days' THEN '0_7d' WHEN < '14d' '7_14d' WHEN < '30d' '14_30d' ELSE 'gt_30d' END`.
   - `mv_wo_status_summary (org_id, site_id, line_id, status, wo_count, wip_count, avg_duration_min)` — from 08-PROD work_orders + wo_executions.
   - `mv_shipment_otd_weekly (org_id, site_id, customer_id, week_ending, otd_pct, fulfillment_rate, avg_pack_min)` — from 11-SHIP shipments + sales_orders; guard with `IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='shipments')` — if 11-SHIP tables absent, create MV with an empty placeholder query and log a deferred-source warning (record the deferral in mv_refresh_log row with status='deferred_source_missing').
   - Unique indexes on each MV.
   - REVOKE PUBLIC + GRANT app_reporting_role.
2. Drizzle entries in `packages/db/src/schema/reporting-views.ts`.
3. Service helpers per MV in `packages/reporting/src/queries/{inventory-aging,wo-status,shipment-otd}.ts` with org+site guardrail.
4. Register view names in `packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts` enum.
5. Vitest contract test for each MV: (a) declared columns + unique idx exist, (b) cross-org leak test, (c) age_bucket logic verified with seeded LP rows, (d) shipment MV gracefully degrades when 11-SHIP tables absent (deferred_source_missing path).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0084_reporting_mv_operational.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-views.ts [modify]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/inventory-aging.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/wo-status.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/shipment-otd.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts [modify]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-operational.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0084 runs in DB with 05-WH + 08-PROD source tables present (11-SHIP absent), when MVs are inspected, then mv_inventory_aging + mv_wo_status_summary populate; mv_shipment_otd_weekly is created but populated with the deferred-source-placeholder rowset (zero rows) + a deferred warning row in mv_refresh_log.
2. Given 11-SHIP tables become available later, when migration is re-runnable as idempotent forward script (or a follow-up migration is applied), then mv_shipment_otd_weekly populates normally without manual intervention; deferred_source_missing flag clears.
3. Given LP rows with received_at 3 days ago and 20 days ago, when mv_inventory_aging is refreshed, then age_bucket reflects '0_7d' and '14_30d' respectively.
4. Given two orgs have seeded LPs / WOs / shipments, when service helpers query under each org session, then cross-org leak test passes.
5. Given each MV has a unique index, when refresh worker (T-005) is invoked, then REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY succeeds on all three.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-operational.test.ts` covers all 5 ACs; uses testcontainers Postgres + scenarios with and without 11-SHIP tables.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test mv-operational`.
- GREEN: write migration with IF EXISTS guard + Drizzle + helpers + enum.

## Risk red lines
- Do not let shipment MV migration fail when 11-SHIP module is absent — IF EXISTS guard + deferred-source path (11-SHIPPING is 0-tasks today per Auditor A).
- Do not skip the LP age_bucket computation server-side; do not derive it client-side (cross-row leak + perf risk).
- Do not skip unique index per MV.
- Do not GRANT to PUBLIC; app_reporting_role only.
- Do not bypass app.current_org_id() function in service helpers.
- Do not introduce 11-SHIP schema changes here — that is 11-SHIPPING module's job; this task is consumer-side only.

pipeline_inputs.description: Inventory Aging + WO Status + Shipment OTD MVs with consumer-pattern guards; shipment MV degrades gracefully when 11-SHIP tables absent.
pipeline_inputs.details: Consumer of 05-WH license_plates, 08-PROD work_orders + wo_executions, 11-SHIP shipments + sales_orders. age_bucket logic server-side. IF EXISTS guard for 11-SHIP path (module has 0 atomic tasks at this writing). Register in mv-registry enum.

Do not implement archive cron for cold storage

Given LP rows with received_at 3 days ago and 20 days ago, when mv_inventory_aging is refreshed, then age_bucket reflects 0_7d and 14_30d respectively
Given two orgs have seeded LPs / WOs / shipments, when service helpers query under each org session, then cross-org leak test passes

Given infrastructure and compliance are checked, when verified, then mv_shipment_otd_weekly populates normally without manual intervention and REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY succeeds on all three.
